phrases.phrase4: Physical discipline. Aesthetic optimization. Mental mastery.
phrases.phrase6: Your appearance is your first competitive advantage.

philosophy.legacy: In a hyper-competitive and looks-focused world, your face and physique determine how people treat you, the opportunities you receive, and the standard of living you experience. This 12-week program is only for those ready to be part of the elite.
philosophy.text: True transformation doesn’t just happen in the body. It happens in the mind, in discipline, and in how you approach each day. Our system combines physical training, aesthetic optimization, advanced nutrition, and biohacking protocols to maximize your physique, presence, and mental performance.

results.title: Results
results.text: Maximize your inner and outer self. We understand the science behind optimizing your physique, appearance, and performance. We reduce your body fat percentage, improve your physical presence, and apply modern performance protocols so you project confidence, energy, and mastery. We only accept 50 clients per year. This program isn’t for everyone; it’s for those ready to commit to their transformation. Build your best version.

coach.title: Your Coach
coach.name: Mateo Haces
coach.description: High-performance athlete, MMA fighter, and exercise physiology specialist. Mateo has dedicated his life to understanding how to transform the human body through science, discipline, physical training, aesthetic optimization, and modern biohacking protocols.

hero.subtitle: The Weak Make Excuses. The Strong Make History.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: At Golden Era, we do not accept mediocrity. We transform ambitious people into unstoppable individuals. If you seek comfort, look elsewhere. Here we forge disciplined individuals who dominate in business, relationships, and life. The body reflects the mindset, and we work to strengthen both.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: We envision a world where people develop discipline, strength, and confidence. Where physical training becomes a tool to build character, leadership, and self-respect.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.text: Discipline is the foundation of all transformation. It turns goals into results.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.text: We seek constant improvement in every training, decision, and step of the process.

transformation.title: Transformation
transformation.text: The goal is not just to change the body, but to develop a strong and resilient mindset.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.text: True leadership begins with personal mastery and the ability to inspire others.

power.title: Absolute Power
power.subtitle: Your physique reflects your discipline. It’s time to build the best version of yourself.

cta.title: Will you stay the same or build your best version?
cta.text: Only 50 people per year are part of the program. Results depend on those who choose to commit.

popup.fullAccess: Full access to the Golden Era program

hero.titlePost: Only for those who dare to be their best version
hero.subtitle: Stop being invisible. Stop being average. It’s time to claim your respect. Only 50 warriors per year.

testimonial.quote: Golden Era is not just a fitness program. It’s a complete transformation of who you are. They taught me that my body is my first business card, and now I command respect in every room I enter.
